exampleSentencesTranslated: He has a lot of experience working in this field.
She wants to learn experience from those who came before.
I think practical experience is very important when looking for a job.

translation.en: I need experience in my job.

definitions.en: Knowledge or skill acquired through experience.
definitions.es: Conocimiento o habilidad adquirida a través de la experiencia.
definitions.vi: Kiến thức hoặc kỹ năng có được qua kinh nghiệm.

example.en: I have a lot of experience in this field.
example.es: Tengo mucha experiencia en este campo.
example.vi: Tôi có nhiều kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực này.

notes_md:
**Kinh nghiệm** means *experience* — the knowledge and skills you get from doing something over time. It’s usually uncountable in Vietnamese, so you say **nhiều/ít kinh nghiệm**, not a number.

Very common verbs: **có kinh nghiệm** (have experience), **tích lũy kinh nghiệm** (gain/build up experience), **rút kinh nghiệm** (learn a lesson from a mistake).  

It can also mean a *lesson learned* after something happens (especially in rút kinh nghiệm).  
Don’t confuse it with **trải nghiệm** — that’s a specific experience/event you go through, not the skill you gain from it.

translation.en: I need experience in my job.

notes:
Kinh nghiệm means experience — the knowledge and skills you get from doing something over time. It’s usually uncountable in Vietnamese, so you say nhiều/ít kinh nghiệm, not a number.

Very common verbs: có kinh nghiệm (have experience), tích lũy kinh nghiệm (gain/build up experience), rút kinh nghiệm (learn a lesson from a mistake).  

It can also mean a lesson learned after something happens (especially in rút kinh nghiệm).  
Don’t confuse it with trải nghiệm — that’s a specific experience/event you go through, not the skill you gain from it.
exampleSentences: Anh đã có nhiều kinh nghiệm làm việc trong lĩnh vực này.
Chị muốn học hỏi kinh nghiệm từ những người đi trước.
Em nghĩ kinh nghiệm thực tế rất quan trọng khi tìm việc.
